betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Basic Ores§f

§aDiscover and mine the new metal ores added by Thermal Foundation!§f

§bThermal Foundation§f adds §e9§f metal ores via §bCoFH World§f: Copper, Tin, Silver, Lead, Aluminum, Nickel, Platinum, Iridium, and Mana Infused. These are the foundation for all Thermal-series mods.

§6Ore Tiers§f:
§b• Stone Pickaxe§f — Copper (§eY 40-96§f), Tin, Silver, Lead, Aluminum, Nickel
§b• Diamond Pickaxe§f — Platinum (§cno worldgen§f), Iridium, Mana Infused

§6Processing§f:
Smelt 1:1 for ingots. §bPulverizer§f doubles output to 2x dust. §bInduction Smelter§f: Ore + Sand → §e2§f ingots (§e5%§f Rich Slag). Add Rich Slag or Cinnabar for §e3§f ingots.

§eNote§f: Smashing-enchanted pickaxe drops §e2x pulverized metal§f directly.
